subparts.text: Explain the concept of indexing and Matching with the help of example. 2.5 I

How does LSI improve upon the traditional Vector Space Model? 2.5 II

What is the Vector Space Model in Information Retrieval and How does the Vector Space Model represent documents and queries? 5 I

What do you mean by document normalization and also describe its impacts 5 I

What is the role of SVD in Latent Semantic Analysis in Information Retrieval? 5 II
How does LSI improve chatbot and conversational AI responses by capturing semantic meaning? 5 II
